ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the client is located */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the client is located */,
  "client_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the client */,
  "contact_person_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person at the client's organization */,
  "contact_person_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_person_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  "client_type" TEXT /* Type of client (e.g., enterprise, small business) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the client belongs to (e.g., technology, healthcare) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clients_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clients_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the state is located */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the state is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_states_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_states_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the region is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the project belongs to */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the project */,
  "changes" REAL /* Changes made to the project */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the status of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the project started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the project is expected to end */,
  "actual_end_date" TEXT /* Actual date the project ended */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES project_statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the project status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_representatives" (
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales representative */,
  "sales_rep_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales representative */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sales representative */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the sales representative */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the sales representative belongs to */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the sales representative was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_rep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_sales_rep" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client */,
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the sales representative started managing the client */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the sales representative stopped managing the client (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id", "sales_rep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the update belongs to */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was made */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User who made the update */,
  "approved_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User who approved the update (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_updates_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_updates_approved_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_updates_updated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales representative, manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)
